adapter_boundary: target-world codebook adapter required when raw feature codes differ
failure_modes: false frame if protocol guard is removed
input_contract: binary stream bits plus optional requested_feature guard
known_bottlenecks: requires target-world codebook adapter when raw feature codes differ
output_contract: accepted Flow Field evidence event or reject

preserve_mask_contract.rule: does not mutate Stable Flow directly; emits accepted evidence event or reject

read_mask_contract.rule: reads raw_bits and optional requested_feature guard

forbidden: target codebook remap without adapter declaration

write_mask_contract.rule: writes only event/proposal channel owned by caller integration layer
